ingredients_text_en_ocr_1617361672:
Salt and vinegar snack from corn and potatoes.  
Ingredients: 37% corn, 26% high oleic sunflower cooking oil, 17% dried potatoes, 15% salt vinegar preparation (maltodextrin, rice flour, table salt, dried barley vinegar extract, dried table vinegar, edible acids: citric acid (tartaric acid (L  +) -); sugar, dried yeast extract), rice flour, emulsifier: mono- and diglycerides of fatty acids.
